title: German Basics
description: A2 Grammar structures using simple A1 vocabulary.

title: German A1 Nouns - Part 1
description: Essential beginner nouns with articles, plurals, and prepositional cases.

title: Everyday German Conversations
description: 100 practical A2-level sentences for daily interactions, hobbies, and social life.

title: Dining and Shopping
description: A2 structures for ordering food and buying goods using A1 vocabulary.

title: Personalpronomen im Dativ
description: Practice all dative personal pronouns — mir, dir, ihm, ihr, uns, euch, ihnen, Ihnen — with common verbs and prepositions.

title: Personalpronomen im Dativ — Verb + Pronomen
description: Type both the conjugated verb and the dative pronoun. All surrounding context is pre-filled.

title: Personalpronomen im Dativ — Kontext
description: Read the German context and type the correct dative pronoun (mir, dir, ihm, ihr, uns, euch, ihnen, Ihnen).

title: Netzwerk Neu A1 — Kapitel 1: Artikel
description: Type the article (der/die/das) for each noun from Netzwerk Neu A1, Kapitel 1.

description: Type the article (der/die/das) and the plural form for each noun from Netzwerk Neu A1, Kapitel 1.
